# 10 Simple Yet Cool Popular Effects in Modern UI (ft. GSAP, Color Blending, etc.) 

A Pen created on CodePen.

Original URL: [https://codepen.io/Juxtopposed/pen/NWExxja](https://codepen.io/Juxtopposed/pen/NWExxja).

10 Simple Yet Cool Popular Effects in Modern UI in the form of a landing page: 

1. Loading Screen
2. Color blending
3. Custom Cursor
4. GSAP smooth scrolling
5. GSAP Horizontal scrolling
6. GSAP Zooming on scroll
7. Fixed Cards on scroll
8. Transitioning text effects
9. Responsive texts
10. Creative buttons
